# Keynote speakers

```{css, echo = FALSE}
/* Keep your justified text, but avoid awkward spacing on narrow screens */
.justify {
  text-align: justify !important;
  hyphens: auto;
}

/* Keynote card styling */
.keynote-card {
  border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
  border-radius: 14px;
  padding: 0;
  margin: 1rem 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.8);
}

/* Make the summary a big, tappable header */
.keynote-card summary {
  cursor: pointer;
  list-style: none;              /* hide default marker in some browsers */
  padding: 0.9rem 1rem;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.9rem;
}

/* Hide default marker (Chrome/Safari) */
.keynote-card summary::-webkit-details-marker {
  display: none;
}

/* Speaker image */
.keynote-photo {
  width: 84px;
  height: 84px;
  object-fit: cover;
  border-radius: 14px;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
}

/* Header text block */
.keynote-head {
  flex: 1 1 auto;
  min-width: 0;
}

.keynote-name {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 1.25rem;
  line-height: 1.2;
}

.keynote-meta {
  margin: 0.25rem 0 0 0;
  opacity: 0.85;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
}

/* “chevron” indicator */
.keynote-toggle {
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  opacity: 0.7;
  font-size: 1.2rem;
}
details[open] .keynote-toggle {
  transform: rotate(180deg);
}

/* Content area */
.keynote-body {
  padding: 0 1rem 1rem 1rem;
}

/* Make links easier to tap */
.keynote-links a {
  display: inline-block;
  margin-top: 0.6rem;
}

/* On small screens, keep it compact */
@media (max-width: 576px) {
  .keynote-photo {
    width: 72px;
    height: 72px;
    border-radius: 12px;
  }
  .keynote-name {
    font-size: 1.15rem;
  }
}
```

```{r results="asis", echo=FALSE}
speakers <- read.csv(file.path("..", "data", "keynote_speakers.csv"))

if ("order" %in% colnames(speakers)) {
  speakers <- speakers[order(speakers$order), ]
}

for (i in 1:nrow(speakers)) {
  x <- speakers[i, ]

  name <- x$name
  position <- if (!is.na(x$position) && x$position != "") x$position else NULL
  #talk <- if (!is.na(x$title) && x$title != "") x$title else NULL
  bio <- if (!is.na(x$txt) && x$txt != "") x$txt else ""
  web <- if (!is.na(x$web) && x$web != "") x$web else NULL
  img <- if (!is.na(x$img_path) && x$img_path != "") x$img_path else NULL

  # A short preview line (first ~160 chars) for mobile friendliness
  preview <- gsub("\\s+", " ", bio)
  preview <- if (nchar(preview) > 160) paste0(substr(preview, 1, 160), "…") else preview

  cat('::: {.keynote-card}\n')
  cat('<details>\n')

  # Summary header (tap area)
  cat('<summary>\n')

  # Photo (if present)
  if (!is.null(img)) {
    cat(sprintf(
      '<img src="../images/keynote_speakers/%s" class="keynote-photo" alt="Photo of %s">\n',
      img, name
    ))
  } else {
    # Fallback spacer if no photo
    cat('<div class="keynote-photo" aria-hidden="true"></div>\n')
  }

  cat('<div class="keynote-head">\n')
  cat(sprintf('<div class="keynote-name"><strong>%s</strong></div>\n', name))

  # Meta lines (position + talk title, compact)
  meta_lines <- c()
  if (!is.null(position)) meta_lines <- c(meta_lines, position)
  if (length(meta_lines) > 0) {
    cat(sprintf('<div class="keynote-meta">%s</div>\n', paste(meta_lines, "<br/>")))
  } else {
    cat(sprintf('<div class="keynote-meta">%s</div>\n', preview))
  }

  cat('</div>\n') # keynote-head
  cat('<div class="keynote-toggle" aria-hidden="true">▾</div>\n')
  cat('</summary>\n')

  # Body (hidden until expanded)
  cat('<div class="keynote-body">\n')

  if (bio != "") {
    cat('::: {.justify}\n')
    cat(bio, "\n")
    cat(':::\n')
  }

  if (!is.null(web)) {
    cat('<div class="keynote-links">\n')
    cat(sprintf('<a href="%s">Website</a>\n', web))
    cat('</div>\n')
  }

  cat('</div>\n') # keynote-body

  cat('</details>\n')
  cat(':::\n\n')
}
```
